commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4a0eaae656ff9d3efedb95eec5738db4d5647e7c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR marks Mistral OpenAI-compatible models as supporting `prompt_cache_key`, separates prompt-cache-key support from long-retention support, updates shared compat types/handling, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +128. Total +148 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's Mistral patch lacks `supportsPromptCacheKey`, and the relevant transport path only sends `prompt_cache_key` when compat resolves true. I did not run a live Mistral call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer live Mistral proof plus a pricing correction; automation cannot supply the external-provider proof for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(mistral): enable prompt cache key compat
target.body:
Fixes #83709.

## Summary
- mark bundled Mistral OpenAI-compatible models as supporting `prompt_cache_key`
- keep Mistral compat normalization and resolved-compat reuse checks aware of the prompt-cache flag
- add focused Mistral extension coverage for the new compat flag

## Test plan
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-providers.config.ts extensions/mistral/api.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/provider-attribution.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
**Behavior or issue addressed**: Mistral model compat did not advertise `supportsPromptCacheKey`, so the shared OpenAI-compatible transport stripped or omitted `prompt_cache_key` even when cache retention and a session key were available.

**Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw checkout on Linux at commit `4b69ac72c02470ddad9e40b99d1c2d25ae58d949`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-providers.config.ts extensions/mistral/api.test.ts && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/provider-attribution.test.ts && pnpm tsgo:extensions:test && git diff --check`

**Evidence after fix**: Terminal output from the patched checkout:
```text
Mistral extension tests: 12 tests passed
Provider attribution tests: 31 tests passed
pnpm tsgo:extensions:test passed
git diff --check passed
```

**Observed result after fix**: The copied Mistral compat assertions now resolve bundled Mistral models with `supportsPromptCacheKey: true`, so existing OpenAI-compatible transport logic can preserve `prompt_cache_key` when cache retention is enabled.

**What was not tested**: A live Mistral API cache-hit or billing assertion was not run because it requires external credentials and cache-hit timing is best-effort.
target.author: alix-007
